name: claude-code-review-loop
description: Delegate implementation to normal Claude Code CLI while Codex plans, reviews diffs, and validates results.

interface.shortDescription: Use Claude Code CLI, then review diffs.
interface.longDescription: A small Codex workflow plugin that saves Codex context by sending implementation work to normal Claude Code CLI. Codex remains responsible for planning, diff review, validation, and final acceptance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code Review Loop for this coding task: briefly plan, dispatch implementation to Claude Code CLI, review the real diff, run validation, and only accept passing work.
